sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n4461" key="a)lloioproswpe/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀλλοιο-προσωπέω</orth>, <sense id="n4461.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be separated from another planet by a distance differing from that between their two domiciles</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:65:8" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">65.8</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
